title: triorchos ecristatus
intro: Triorchos ecristatus, also known as the "Triorchus," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Triorchos ecristatus include its ability to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as its capacity to combat infections and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", triorchos ecristatus benefits include its antiparasitic activity, specifically showing a marked effect against the protoscoleces of E. granulosus, with the extract reducing protoscoleces viability and causing tegumental changes.
